notes:
Ember 1.9.7 — Fixed a crash when replaying a recorded workflow

• Playing back a recorded workflow could crash Ember entirely ("Ember quit unexpectedly") on macOS. Root cause: replay simulated input via pynput's Controller, which shares the same low-level macOS event machinery as pynput's Listener — already known to hard-crash the process when driven off the main thread. Replay now uses the same simulation mechanism (pyautogui) Ember's own AI mouse/keyboard control already relies on safely.

Builds on 1.9.6's natural voice connection fix.
